payload.claim_text: All bus routes in the MTA network entering the Congestion Relief Zone have ample capacity to transport the additional passengers anticipated after Congestion Pricing goes live.

records.raw_text: Detailed analysis has shown that all bus routes in the MTA network entering the Congestion Relief Zone have ample capacity to transport the additional passengers anticipated after Congestion Pricing goes live.
